title: pelargonium × nutans
intro: Pelargonium × nutans, also known as the Rose-scented Geranium or Nutant Geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the genus Pelargonium, often used in herbal medicine and perfumery. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × nutans include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
